message:
feat(tailer): overflow GAP insertion on sustained backpressure

When a pane experiences consecutive backpressure events exceeding the
threshold (5), the tailer now emits a synthetic Gap segment with reason
"backpressure_overflow" to signal that capture data was likely lost.

- Add OVERFLOW_BACKPRESSURE_THRESHOLD constant (5 consecutive events)
- Track consecutive_backpressure and overflow_gap_pending per PaneTailer
- Add PollOutcome::OverflowGapEmitted variant
- Add overflow_gaps_emitted to TailerMetrics
- Emit synthetic gap via PaneCursor::emit_overflow_gap() on next poll
- Reset counter on successful capture (Changed/NoChange)
- 13 new tests covering threshold tracking, gap emission, seq advance

Implements wa-upg.12.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
